vibe: Energetic gaming, high-tech, aggressive, cyberpunk equivalent for Garry's Mod servers

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF1E56] hover:bg-[#D90429] text-white font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-sm transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,30,86,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(255,30,86,0.7)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#B026FF] text-white hover:bg-[#B026FF]/10 font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-sm transition-all duration-300

cards.base: bg-[#150029] border border-[#B026FF]/20 rounded-lg p-8 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[#FF1E56]/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,30,86,0.15)] relative overflow-hidden

header.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0014]/80 border-b border-[#B026FF]/20 transition-all duration-300

badges.promo: absolute top-4 right-4 bg-[#FF1E56] text-white text-xs font-black uppercase px-3 py-1 rounded-sm tracking-wider shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,30,86,0.5)] transform rotate-3

hero_background.description: Abstract energetic glowing neon red/purple void for the hero section background

hosting_image.description: Futuristic server racks glowing with red and purple lights for the Hosting category section

addons_image.description: Glowing digital crates/modules for the Addons category section

maps_image.description: Wireframe neon city landscape for the Maps category section

logo_icon.description: Stylized N logo for navbar and footer

hero_section.title: Nexus Network
hero_section.subtitle: Najlepszy hosting, addony i mapy do Garry's Mod. Zbuduj swój idealny serwer już dziś.

categories: Hosting - Niezawodne serwery oparte o procesory o wysokim taktowaniu
Addony - Unikalne skrypty i modyfikacje do Twojego serwera
Mapy - Autorskie, zoptymalizowane mapy tworzone z myślą o roleplay

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rule: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, package cards) must have a data-testid attribute.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images uses a background overlay (e.g., bg-black/60) to maintain legibility.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use lucide-react for icons (e.g., Server, Package, Map, Shield, Zap, ChevronDown).
Use framer-motion for energetic entrance animations, especially on the Hero section and Package cards.
Implement the 'Kup teraz' (Buy now) buttons in the pricing section to redirect to a Stripe checkout (this can be a mockup link or a redirect to an API route).
Admin panel should be built on the `/admin` route with a data table for managing the packages. Use Shadcn Table component.
Ensure 'Nexus Network' is the prominent H1 on startup, styled with the text gradient.
Import Google Fonts: 'Unbounded' (Weights 400, 700, 900) and 'Outfit' (Weights 400, 500, 600, 700) in the root HTML/CSS.
Use custom grid layouts instead of generic standard columns for the features section.
